message:
Merge PR #1353: feat(dashboard): add agent terminal preview in Sessions panel

Click a session row to see live terminal output with 3s auto-refresh.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1353
Author: rod-nxtlevel (Rodrigo Fernandez)
Co-authored-by: nux <rodrigo@nxtlevelsaas.com>
